Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPVS2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; GMRVUT0 1446 ; SRCHVS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N CNT,DFN,ICN,PXFILTER,IX,RSLTARY,SMRY,ARRAY,GMRVSTR,DTFND,DT1,DT2 S (DFN,ICN,GMRVSTR)="",(SMRY,CNT,IX,DTFND,DT1,DT2)=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ;Check patient parameter I $P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter: patient is required.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHVS^DVPVS2")=0 G QUIT ;Check for at least category or code I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: code OR category are required.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") ;Check Code I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)'="" D . ;not implemented . N CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D I FND D MAKEOO(.TARGET,"CO","NI",$P(CODE,",",IX),IX) G QUIT . . N VAL S FND=0 F VAL="8306-3","8287-5","39156-5","8480-6","8462-4","8478-0" D Q:FND . . . I VAL=$P(CODE,",",IX) S FND=1 Q . ;bad code . K CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D I 'FND D MAKEOO(.TARGET,"CO","BAD",$P(CODE,",",IX),IX) G QUIT . . N VAL S FND=0 F VAL="9279-1","8867-4","59408-5","8310-5","8302-2","29463-7","85353-1","85354-9" D Q:FND . . . I VAL=$P(CODE,",",IX) S FND=1 Q ;Check category I $P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U)'="" D . ;not implemented . N CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D I FND D MAKEOO(.TARGET,"CA","NI",$P(CODE,",",IX),IX) G QUIT . . N VAL S FND=0 F VAL="head-occipital-frontal-circumference","body-mass-index","systolic-blood-pressure","diastolic-blood-pressure" D Q:FND . . . I VAL=$P(CODE,",",IX) S FND=1 Q . ;bad code . K CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D I 'FND D MAKEOO(.TARGET,"CA","BAD",$P(CODE,",",IX),IX) G QUIT . . N VAL S FND=0 F VAL="vital-signs","respiratory-rate","heart-rate","oxygen-saturation","body-temperature","blood-pressure","body-height","body-weight" D Q:FND . . . I VAL=$P(CODE,",",IX) S FND=1 Q ;Prepare the vars for the search I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)'="" D . N CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="85353-1" S GMRVSTR="R;P;PO2;T;HT;WT;BP;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="9279-1" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"R;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="8867-4" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"P;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="59408-5" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"PO2;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="8310-5" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"T;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="8302-2" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"HT;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="29463-7" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"WT;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="85354-9" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"BP;" I $P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U)'="" D . N CODE,FND S CODE=$P($G(QUERYPAR("category")),U) . F IX=1:1:20 Q:$P(CODE,",",IX)="" D . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="vital-signs" S GMRVSTR="R;P;PO2;T;HT;WT;BP;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="respiratory-rate" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"R;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="heart-rate" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"P;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="oxygen-saturation" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"PO2;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="body-temperature" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"T;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="body-height" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"HT;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="body-weight" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"WT;" . . I $P(CODE,",",IX)="blood-pressure" S GMRVSTR=GMRVSTR_"BP;" ;Date: supported only gt;lt;ge;le;eq prefixes I $P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U)'="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date is missing the prefix.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") I $P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U)'="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3)'="" D G:'DTFND QUIT . N PFX S PFX=$E($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3),1,2) . N APFX F APFX="gt","lt","ge","le","eq" S:APFX=PFX DTFND=1 . I 'DTFND D Q . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","value","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date, prefix: "_PFX_" is not valid.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") . N FMDT S FMDT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U)) . I PFX="eq" S (DT1,DT2)=FMDT . I PFX="ge" S DT1=FMDT,DT2=$$NOW^XLFDT() . I PFX="le" S DT2=FMDT,DT1=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),10000,0,0,0) . I PFX="gt" S DT1=$$FMADD^XLFDT(FMDT,1,0,0,0),DT2=$$NOW^XLFDT() . I PFX="lt" S DT2=$$FMADD^XLFDT(FMDT,-1,0,0,0),DT1=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),10000,0,0,0) ;Perform search ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 S $P(GMRVSTR(0),U,1)=DT1,$P(GMRVSTR(0),U,2)=DT2,$P(GMRVSTR(0),U,3)=100000,$P(GMRVSTR(0),U,4)=0 K ^UTILITY($J) D EN1^GMRVUT0 N CNT,CAT,DT,IEN S (CAT,IEN,DT)="",CNT=0 F S CAT=$O(^UTILITY($J,"GMRVD",CAT)) Q:CAT="" D . F S DT=$O(^UTILITY($J,"GMRVD",CAT,DT)) Q:DT="" D . . F S IEN=$O(^UTILITY($J,"GMRVD",CAT,DT,IEN)) Q:IEN="" D . . . S CNT=CNT+1 K ARRAY D FHIRVS^DVPVS1(.ARRAY,$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("vital-signs","",ICN,IEN),SMRY) . . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",CNT)=ARRAY K ^UTILITY($J) QUIT ; Q ; MAKEOO(TARGET,TYPE,ERR,VAL,IDX) ; ; TYPE: CO=code CA=category ; ERR: NI=not implemented BAD=bad code ; VAL: value string ; IX: index of bad value N MSG S MSG="Parameter: "_$S(TYPE="CO":"code",TYPE="CA":"category")_"("_IDX_") {"_VAL_"} is "_$S(ERR="BAD":"not valid",ERR="NI":"not supported") D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error",$S(ERR="BAD":"value",ERR="NI":"not-supported"),"MSG_PARAM_INVALID",MSG,"SRCHVS^DVPVS2") Q
